name_en: ‚≠źÔłŹExact match development‚≠źÔłŹPerfect details‚≠źÔłŹOriginal hardware [OVER THE MOON Handbag] M59799 Black, M59825 Blue, M59915 Pink, M59959 White, M59823 Yellow (embroidery embossing)
name_cn:
‚≠źÔłŹExact match development‚≠źÔłŹPerfect details‚≠źÔłŹOriginal hardware [OVER THE MOON Handbag] M59799 Black, M59825 Blue, M59915 Pink, M59959 White, M59823 Yellow (embroidery embossing)
This Over The Moon handbag is crafted with supple calfskin to create a flexible silhouette, imbued with a sense of solemnity through Monogram embroidery. The adjustable shoulder strap and chain allow you to switch between elbow carry, short shoulder, crossbody, and long shoulder carry at will; remove the strap to transform it into an evening clutch.
Size: 27.5 x 16 x 7 cm
